On this page

Filter Hooks ​

Filter hooks allow you to modify data as it flows through the plugin. Use add_filter() to hook into these.

air_prompt ​

Modify or replace the AI prompt used for image analysis.

php
add_filter( 'air_prompt', function ( string $prompt, int $max_keywords, bool $set_alt ): string {
    return "Describe this image in {$max_keywords} keywords, focusing on colors and composition.";
}, 10, 3 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$promptstringThe default prompt text
$max_keywordsintMaximum number of keywords
$set_altboolWhether alt text feature is enabled

Source: Groq_Service::get_prompt()

air_allowed_file_types ​

Modify the list of MIME types that the plugin will process.

php
add_filter( 'air_allowed_file_types', function ( array $file_types, string $mime_type ): array {
    $file_types[] = 'image/svg+xml'; // Also process SVGs
    return $file_types;
}, 10, 2 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$file_typesarrayArray of allowed MIME types
$mime_typestringThe MIME type being checked

Source: Groq_Service::is_allowed_type()

air_max_file_size ​

Change the maximum allowed file size for image processing (default: 10 MB).

php
add_filter( 'air_max_file_size', function ( int $max_size, string $image_path ): int {
    return 20 * 1024 * 1024; // 20 MB
}, 10, 2 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$max_sizeintMaximum file size in bytes
$image_pathstringPath to the image file

Source: Groq_Service::generate_description()

air_api_payload ​

Modify the API request payload before it is sent to Groq.

php
add_filter( 'air_api_payload', function ( array $payload, string $image_path ): array {
    $payload['temperature'] = 0.5; // More deterministic results
    $payload['max_tokens']  = 200;
    return $payload;
}, 10, 2 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$payloadarrayThe complete API payload (model, messages, etc.)
$image_pathstringPath to the image file

Source: Groq_Service::generate_description()

air_api_request_args ​

Modify the WordPress HTTP request arguments (timeout, headers, etc.).

php
add_filter( 'air_api_request_args', function ( array $args, array $payload, string $image_path ): array {
    $args['timeout'] = 60; // Increase timeout for large images
    return $args;
}, 10, 3 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$argsarrayWP HTTP request arguments
$payloadarrayThe API payload
$image_pathstringPath to the image file

Source: Groq_Service::generate_description()

air_should_process_upload ​

Control whether a specific upload should be processed by the plugin.

php
add_filter( 'air_should_process_upload', function ( bool $should_process, array $file, string $mime_type ): bool {
    // Skip files larger than 5 MB
    if ( $file['size'] > 5 * 1024 * 1024 ) {
        return false;
    }
    return $should_process;
}, 10, 3 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$should_processboolWhether to process (default: true)
$filearrayThe uploaded file data from $_FILES
$mime_typestringThe MIME type

Source: Image_Uploader::process_upload()

air_generated_description ​

Modify the AI-generated description before it is processed into a filename.

php
add_filter( 'air_generated_description', function ( string|false $description, string $tmp_path, array $file ): string|false {
    if ( $description ) {
        $description .= ', product photo'; // Append context
    }
    return $description;
}, 10, 3 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$descriptionstring|falseThe generated description or false
$tmp_pathstringPath to the temporary uploaded file
$filearrayThe file data

Source: Image_Uploader::process_upload()

air_new_filename ​

Modify the final filename just before it is applied.

php
add_filter( 'air_new_filename', function ( string $filename, string $sanitized_name, string $ext, array $file, string $description ): string {
    return 'product-' . $filename; // Add prefix
}, 10, 5 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$filenamestringThe new filename (with extension)
$sanitized_namestringThe sanitized base name
$extstringThe file extension
$filearrayThe original file data
$descriptionstringThe AI-generated description

Source: Image_Uploader::process_upload()

air_alt_text ​

Modify the alt text before it is saved to the attachment.

php
add_filter( 'air_alt_text', function ( string $alt_text, string $description, array $file ): string {
    return ucwords( $alt_text ); // Capitalize each word
}, 10, 3 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$alt_textstringThe alt text to save
$descriptionstringThe AI-generated description
$filearrayThe file data

Source: Image_Uploader::process_upload()

air_mime_to_ext ​

Customize the MIME type to file extension mapping.

php
add_filter( 'air_mime_to_ext', function ( string $extension ): string {
    return $extension; // Modify as needed
} );

Source: Image_Uploader::get_extension_from_mime()

air_template_paths ​

Prepend custom template directories to override the plugin's Twig templates.

php
add_filter( 'air_template_paths', function ( array $paths ): array {
    array_unshift( $paths, MY_PLUGIN_DIR . 'views' ); // Takes priority
    return $paths;
} );
ParameterTypeDescription
$pathsarrayArray of absolute paths to template directories

Source: Template_Engine::__construct()

air_settings_defaults ​

Add or modify default settings values.

php
add_filter( 'air_settings_defaults', function ( array $defaults ): array {
    $defaults['my_custom_option'] = 'default_value';
    return $defaults;
} );

Source: Settings_Page::get_defaults()

air_available_models ​

Add models to the model selection dropdown in the admin UI.

php
add_filter( 'air_available_models', function ( array $models, string $current ): array {
    $models['my-custom/model-id'] = [
        'label' => 'My Custom Model',
        'provider' => 'custom',
        'desc' => 'A custom model for specialized use.',
        'highlights' => ['speed'],
        'specs' => [
            'params' => '7B',
            'context' => '32k',
            'speed' => '1000 tokens/s',
            'size' => '10 MB',
        ],
    ];
    return $models;
}, 10, 2 );

Source: Settings_Page::get_available_models()

air_valid_models ​

Add model IDs to the validation whitelist (required when adding custom models).

php
add_filter( 'air_valid_models', function ( array $models ): array {
    $models[] = 'my-custom/model-id';
    return $models;
} );

Source: Settings_Page::sanitize_settings()

air_sanitize_settings ​

Modify sanitized settings before they are saved to the database.

php
add_filter( 'air_sanitize_settings', function ( array $sanitized, array $input, array $old ): array {
    if ( isset( $input['my_custom_option'] ) ) {
        $sanitized['my_custom_option'] = sanitize_text_field( $input['my_custom_option'] );
    }
    return $sanitized;
}, 10, 3 );
ParameterTypeDescription
$sanitizedarrayThe sanitized settings
$inputarrayThe raw input from the form
$oldarrayThe previous settings

Source: Settings_Page::sanitize_settings()
